_rationale: Two-tier verification. Stable: report.metadata fields + common report.summary keys are emitted with the same schema by both binaries on the same WIP. Ignore: per-issue arrays (metrics_issues, duplicates, naming_issues) are Go-only enumeration — Go applies extra complexity heuristics that C++ does not implement, so the arrays and the associated *_found counters / risk_score drift. The stable[] block still anchors the metadata + symbol-count shape so a regression in either binary breaks parity.

tiers._rationale_ignore: BASE_IGNORE_NON_DETERMINISM applies implicitly. metrics_issues/duplicates/naming_issues + counters drift because C++ does not implement Go's complexity heuristics. Stable[] above asserts what remains shared.
